channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: RPI at Work Certificate Review
item.description: Date: Thursday, July 23, 2026 12:00 PM - 12:30 PM - Join RPI at Work in a 30-minute information session highlighting the whole range of RPI’s online, project-based graduate certificate programs. These certificates are three courses in length, developing targeted ability groups, and can be completed in as little as seven months. Please complete the register if you plan to attend.
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Reads ends August 3rd!
item.description: Date: Tuesday, July 21, 2026 12:00 AM - Mon , August 3, 2026 11:55 PM - Don’t forget to submit your program materials for RPI Reads by August 3rd to be entered into a raffle. Submissions will be accepted online or in-person at a RPI Libraries service desk. All in-person submissions will receive a small treat as a token of appreciation for reading alongside us and our mascot Herman this summer! If you have any questions or trouble submitting, please contact the RPI Libraries.
item.author: Community

item.title: Electrochemistry Workshop for RPI Community – Aug 11-12, 2026 (Registration Required)
item.description: Date: Tuesday, August 11, 2026 9:00 AM - Wed , August 12, 2026 5:00 PM - The workshop is free to attend and will include both lecture and lab. Open to faculty, postdocs, graduate students and undergrads. Please complete registration before Mon, Aug 3. Attendance will be capped at 24-30 participants.
item.author: Community

item.title: TIAA Confidential Counseling (In-Person)
item.description:
Date: Tuesday, July 28, 2026 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM - A TIAA Financial Consultant will be available for one-on-one consultations on a broad range of retirement topics. Attend this upcoming event to help you become better informed and more confident about Rensselaer’s retirement plan benefits. Consultations will be conducted in 60 minute increments. To schedule your individual retirement counseling, please call TIAA at 1-800-732-8353 or online at https://www.tiaa.org/public/login/schedule-meeting

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
